mapper.select: SELECT tenant_id, sequence, event_id, action, target_type, target_id, operator_user_id, operator_tenant_id, outcome, error_code, read_only, payload_json::text AS payload_json, occurred_at, prev_hash, hash FROM audit_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY sequence DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT count(*) FROM audit_record WHERE event_id = #{eventId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_record (tenant_id, sequence, event_id, action, target_type, target_id, operator_user_id, operator_tenant_id, outcome, error_code, read_only, payload_json, occurred_at, prev_hash, hash) VALUES (#{row.tenantId}, #{row.sequence}, #{row.eventId}, #{row.action}, #{row.targetType}, #{row.targetId}, #{row.operatorUserId}, #{row.operatorTenantId}, #{row.outcome}, #{row.errorCode}, #{row.readOnly}, #{row.payloadJson}::jsonb, #{row.occurredAt}, #{row.prevHash}, #{row.hash})
mapper.select: SELECT tenant_id, sequence, event_id, action, target_type, target_id, operator_user_id, operator_tenant_id, outcome, error_code, read_only, payload_json::text AS payload_json, occurred_at, prev_hash, hash FROM audit_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY sequence
